title: Moore's Law: The Observation That Shaped the Digital Age
big_statement: How one bold prediction guided decades of computing

title: What Is Moore's Law?
bullets: Transistors per chip double ~every two years
figure_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 1000 620'><rect width='1000' height='620' fill='#1e222a'/><text x='60' y='44' fill='#f2f0eb' font-family='Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif' font-size='26' font-weight='bold'>Transistors per chip: doubling every ~2 years</text><line x1='120' y1='80' x2='120' y2='540' stroke='#9aa0ab' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='120' y1='540' x2='940' y2='540' stroke='#9aa0ab' stroke-width='2'/><g stroke='#9aa0ab' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='4 6' opacity='0.4'><line x1='120' y1='425' x2='940' y2='425'/><line x1='120' y1='310' x2='940' y2='310'/><line x1='120' y1='195' x2='940' y2='195'/><line x1='120' y1='80' x2='940' y2='80'/></g><g fill='#9aa0ab' font-family='Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif' font-size='16' text-anchor='end'><text x='108' y='545'>10^3</text><text x='108' y='430'>10^5</text><text x='108' y='315'>10^7</text><text x='108' y='200'>10^9</text><text x='108' y='85'>10^11</text></g><g fill='#9aa0ab' font-family='Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle'><text x='135' y='565'>1971</text><text x='403' y='565'>1989</text><text x='657' y='565'>2006</text><text x='880' y='565'>2021</text></g><polyline points='135,519 239,456 299,417 403,363 523,317 567,274 657,226 746,186 821,121 880,94' fill='none' stroke='#e8a13c' stroke-width='3'/><g fill='#e8a13c'><circle cx='135' cy='519' r='6'/><circle cx='239' cy='456' r='6'/><circle cx='299' cy='417' r='6'/><circle cx='403' cy='363' r='6'/><circle cx='523' cy='317' r='6'/><circle cx='567' cy='274' r='6'/><circle cx='657' cy='226' r='6'/><circle cx='746' cy='186' r='6'/><circle cx='821' cy='121' r='6'/><circle cx='880' cy='94' r='6'/></g><text x='700' y='600' fill='#9aa0ab' font-family='Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'>Year microchip first introduced (semi-log scale)</text></svg>

title: The 18-Month Myth
bullets: David House: performance doubles every 18 months

title: A Self-Fulfilling Prophecy
bullets: Became a goal for the whole industry
Cheaper computing, more memory, better sensors

title: Extraordinary Ingenuity
figure_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 1000 620'><rect width='1000' height='620' fill='#1e222a'/><text x='60' y='60' fill='#f2f0eb' font-family='Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif' font-size='26' font-weight='bold'>Shrinking process nodes</text><text x='60' y='92' fill='#9aa0ab' font-family='Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif' font-size='17'>Feature size collapses from micrometers to nanometers</text><line x1='100' y1='330' x2='900' y2='330' stroke='#9aa0ab' stroke-width='3'/><g fill='#e8a13c'><circle cx='100' cy='330' r='30'/><circle cx='325' cy='330' r='20'/><circle cx='563' cy='330' r='12'/><circle cx='647' cy='330' r='9'/><circle cx='802' cy='330' r='6'/><circle cx='900' cy='330' r='4'/></g><g fill='#f2f0eb' font-family='Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif' font-size='20' font-weight='bold' text-anchor='middle'><text x='100' y='250'>20 μm</text><text x='563' y='250'>130 nm</text><text x='802' y='250'>7 nm</text></g><g fill='#f2f0eb' font-family='Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif' font-size='20' font-weight='bold' text-anchor='middle'><text x='325' y='430'>1 μm</text><text x='647' y='430'>45 nm</text><text x='900' y='430'>2 nm</text></g><g fill='#9aa0ab' font-family='Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif' font-size='15' text-anchor='middle'><text x='100' y='278'>1968</text><text x='563' y='278'>2001</text><text x='802' y='278'>2018</text><text x='325' y='458'>1984</text><text x='647' y='458'>2007</text><text x='900' y='458'>2025</text></g></svg>

title: Moore's Second Law (Rock's Law)
bullets: Manufacturing tools double in cost every 4 years
figure_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 1000 620'><rect width='1000' height='620' fill='#1e222a'/><text x='60' y='55' fill='#f2f0eb' font-family='Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif' font-size='26' font-weight='bold'>Two opposing trends</text><line x1='120' y1='100' x2='120' y2='520' stroke='#9aa0ab' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='120' y1='520' x2='900' y2='520' stroke='#9aa0ab' stroke-width='2'/><text x='510' y='560' fill='#9aa0ab' font-family='Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle'>Time / chip generations</text><polyline points='140,150 300,230 460,300 620,360 780,400 880,420' fill='none' stroke='#9aa0ab' stroke-width='4'/><polyline points='140,480 300,455 460,410 620,340 780,220 880,130' fill='none' stroke='#e8a13c' stroke-width='4'/><text x='260' y='185' fill='#9aa0ab' font-family='Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif' font-size='18'>Cost to consumers falls</text><text x='540' y='190' fill='#e8a13c' font-family='Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif' font-size='18' font-weight='bold'>Fab & tool costs rise exponentially</text><text x='300' y='500' fill='#9aa0ab' font-family='Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif' font-size='15'>tools double in cost every ~4 years</text></svg>

title: Is Moore's Law Dead?
bullets: Intel: cadence now closer to three years
Intel's Gelsinger insisted it lives on
Moore: atomic limit within a decade or two

title: Spin-Off Observations
bullets: Wirth's law — software bloat offsets gains

title: The Takeaway
big_statement: Never a guarantee — a bold prediction that shaped the digital age, still driving the hunt for what comes next
